method_description: Exploratory engineered removal method representing direct air capture with permanent storage under large cost uncertainty.
evidence_summary: Removals are treated cautiously, using official Australian projections for land-sink context and international DAC cost evidence for engineered removals.
derivation_method: Exploratory supply-method synthesis. Kept separate from ordinary production sectors so users can enable or disable removals explicitly.
review_notes: Not recommended for core MVP runs without explicit scenario review. Included to preserve an engineered-removal placeholder in the library.
